title: 50L Laundry Basket with Extended Handle, Collapisable Laundry Bag, Foldable Laundry Hamper, Folding Washing Storage Bin, Dark Grey
features: Handle - This laundry basket is lightweight with extended handle, sturdy and comfortable to carry
Lasting Material - 600D oxford fabric with thickened PE coating for mositureproof
Fully Collapsible - Easily fold to carry and store in cabinet or drawer
TIPS - Do not use washing machine to clean the bag, it will damage coating
